headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Expands Chase Digital Bank Across Europe In Five Year Push
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) is extending its Chase digital bank into multiple new European markets. The company plans to target at least five European countries within five years, including large markets such as France, Spain, and Italy. The expansion is aimed at building Chase into a prominent digital banking brand beyond its U.S. core customer base. For you as an investor, this expansion highlights how JPMorgan Chase is using its existing digital banking platform to reach more retail...

headline: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Stock After 25% Yearly Gain Is The Price Still Reasonable
summary: If you are wondering whether JPMorgan Chase stock still offers value at current levels, this article walks through what the numbers actually say and how they fit together. The stock last closed at US$331.14, with returns of 5.9% over 7 days, 11.2% over 30 days, 1.7% year to date and 25.3% over 1 year, which has put valuation front of mind for many investors. Recent coverage has focused on JPMorgan Chase as one of the major U.S. banks at the center of conversations about interest rates,...

headline: Morningstar Wealth Teams with Apollo, Franklin Templeton and J.P. Morgan Asset Management to Develop Public/Private Model Portfolios
summary: CHICAGO, June 17, 2026--Morningstar (Nasdaq: MORN) today announced that its Morningstar Wealth division is working with Apollo, Franklin Templeton and J.P. Morgan Asset Management to launch a suite of public/private model portfolios that give financial advisors a single, research-driven way to access private markets.

content.title: Morningstar Wealth Teams with Apollo, Franklin Templeton and J.P. Morgan Asset Management to Develop Public/Private Model Portfolios

Morgan Asset Management to launch a suite of public/private model portfolios that give financial advisors a single, research-driven way to access private markets.

headline: Morningstar Teams Up With Apollo, Franklin Templeton and J.P. Morgan on Public/Private Model Portfolios
summary: The six new portfolios, which are expected to launch later this year, will invest from 12% to 20% of assets in private credit and real estate.

content.title: Morningstar Teams Up With Apollo, Franklin Templeton and J.P. Morgan on Public/Private Model Portfolios
content.summary: The six new portfolios, which are expected to launch later this year, will invest from 12% to 20% of assets in private credit and real estate.

headline: Umicore - Transparency notifications by JP Morgan Chase & Co.
summary: Transparency notifications byJP Morgan Chase & Co. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by JP Morgan Chase & Co. that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards on 8 June 2026 and that it has crossed the threshold of 3% for equivalent financial instruments upwards on 9 June 2026. headline: Big Bank Stocks Hit Records Ahead of Fed Meeting
summary: Shares of large U.S. banks outperformed the market on Wednesday, with some hitting records, as investors awaited the first Federal Open Market Committee meeting of Kevin Warsh’s Fed chairmanship.  Investment banks Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley also rallied and hit records, according to FactSet and Dow Jones Market Data.  Traders widely expect the Fed will keep the benchmark federal-funds rate target unchanged at a range of 3.50% to 3.75%.

content.title: Big Bank Stocks Hit Records Ahead of Fed Meeting

Traders widely expect the Fed will keep the benchmark federal-funds rate target unchanged at a range of 3.50% to 3.75%.
